loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing total current THD and per-phase R values for H5/H7; voltage harmonics, flicker, and crest factor are not measured by this UPS meter.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing I-THD and V-THD trends over the last 7 days; per-order harmonics (H5/H7) are not measured by this asset and are omitted.
